CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__FNC_FinanceProjectsVisibiltyUsers](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[ProjectId] [int] NULL,
	[UserId] [int] NULL,
	[DateTimeAdd] [datetime] NULL,
	[UserAddId] [int] NULL,
)

ALTER TABLE [__FNC_AccessProfile] ADD [FinanceOrder] BIT NULL, [FinanceProject] BIT NULL;
alter table __FNC_BudgetAllocationCompany add AmountNotificationSuperValidationThreshold decimal(20,7) null;

alter table __FNC_CompanyExtension
add SuperValidatorOneEmail nvarchar(max) null,
SuperValidatorOneId int null,
SuperValidatorOneName nvarchar(max) null,
SuperValidatorTowEmail nvarchar(max) null,
SuperValidatorTowId int null,
SuperValidatorTowName nvarchar(max) null
